authoritative_source: EL-0134 (2025 systematic review, methodological weight A) and EL-0117, EL-0121 (2024 prospective cohorts)
resolution_note: GL-OB-2019-08 predates the 2024 cohorts and the 2025 review. Guideline citation set aside. Downstream update flagged in RR-EV-003.

authoritative_source: EL-0072, EL-0088, EL-0110, EL-0119, EL-0126, EL-0139 (2019-2024 studies, methodological weight A and B)
authoritative_value: Consistent reduction in third and fourth degree perineal trauma in water birth cohorts
decoy_value: Cites 2018 review with weaker methodology and smaller sample sizes
resolution_note: 2018 review is superseded by the six 2019-2024 studies. Guideline citation set aside. Downstream update flagged in RR-EV-003.

authoritative_value: Weekly deep clean plus per-use disinfection protocol
decoy_value: Bi-weekly deep clean plus per-use disinfection protocol
resolution_note: 2025 consensus is the newer and more authoritative reference. Hospital SOP will be updated to align. Documentation change only, no clinical change.

authoritative_source: Department board entry POOL-B-STATUS refreshed October 27 2026 by biomed lead
resolution_note: Biomed lead updates the board directly. Service desk closure lags by two weeks routinely. Process gap flagged in RR-EQ-002.

authoritative_source: Department board KIT-STATUS with inline biomed note September 21 2026
resolution_note: THERM-B recalibrated September 21 2026. Service desk record not updated. Board is authoritative for calibration status.

authoritative_source: EL-0091 (2022, n=380) and EL-0141 (2025, n=310), both below methodological weight A threshold
authoritative_value: Neither trend statistically significant. Sample sizes below 400 and no pre-registered protocols.
decoy_source: Absence of publication in this domain
decoy_value: Some readers treat absence of publication as reassurance
resolution_note: Evidence is thin. R2 makes no claim on this domain. Held as monitored gap in RR-EV-002. Do not force a verdict.

authoritative_value: 26 minutes within operational tolerance of 30 minutes
resolution_note: 2026 measurement supersedes the 2023 commissioning figure. Pool B fill time remains within operational tolerance and is not a blocking dependency for the November 27 2026 decision.
